generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 Strategic autonomy isn't just about us—it's about protecting our allies from reckless foreign interference. Imagine if our partners couldn't count on us in a crisis because we relied on unstable supply chains. That's not just a national security risk; it's a betrayal of our duty to maintain global stability. We've seen what happens when we're not prepared: chaos, vulnerability, and preventable conflicts. Let's honor our commitments by ensuring we can stand strong with our allies, no matter what. #StrategicAutonomy #NationalSecurity #DutyFirst
